description: Seeded simple (independent per-unit) randomization schedule assigning units to arms.
rules: read-only — reads a JSON spec, writes a CSV; mutates no live service
seeded — the exact schedule is reproducible from SPEC_JSON.seed
needs numpy + pandas; no network or GPU
usage: Set SPEC_JSON to a JSON file with keys: n (required int), arms (list[str]), ratio (list[int]), seed (int). Output: allocation_schedule.csv under record_store.
limitation: Simple randomization can produce arm-size imbalance with small n; use block-randomization for guaranteed balance. No power/sample-size calculation.
